summary.apply_blocked_reason: Known executor/platform blockers must clear before normal apply.
clearance_steps: Add local TikTok OAuth credentials, then push worker secrets: TIKTOK_CLIENT_KEY, TIKTOK_CLIENT_SECRET, TIKTOK_REFRESH_TOKEN.
Confirm TikTok public posting approval before treating auto-posting as ready.
Run `python3 scripts/build_tiktok_setup_preflight.py` and `python3 scripts/refresh_promo_admin.py` after repair.

items.song: I Learned It All in Fifteen Seconds
clearance_steps: Add local TikTok OAuth credentials, then push worker secrets: TIKTOK_CLIENT_KEY, TIKTOK_CLIENT_SECRET, TIKTOK_REFRESH_TOKEN.
Confirm TikTok public posting approval before treating auto-posting as ready.
Run `python3 scripts/build_tiktok_setup_preflight.py` and `python3 scripts/refresh_promo_admin.py` after repair.
